name: The Madness
short_description: Waking up in an Abandoned Mental Hospital, Daniel studies some notes to escape from here and tries to escape by solving the password. In this first-person game, you try to uncover the mysteries and escape from here.
detailed_description:
Development Process

We started developing this game as a two-person team. It was a challenging experience for us. We were very enthusiastic about this project, but there were times when we lost our enthusiasm. We were determined to release this game. Because it was our first game, we weren't sure what we were doing right or wrong. When we tested the game ourselves, we encountered some bugs. However, we finally got it out. We're constantly updating our game and improving it. If you have any bugs in our game, please contact us.


About the Game

Waking up in an Abandoned Mental Hospital, Daniel studies some notes to escape from here and tries to escape by solving the password. In this first-person game, you try to uncover the mysteries and escape from here.

In this game, you examine the notes and find the passwords.

You find Notes and Keys, find coded or locked doors and find the necessary notes from there.

There is no Save System in this Game. The duration of the game is 30+ minutes.
